## Summary

Brief description of what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Clinical content correction (fixing incorrect/outdated information)
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Existing skill improvement
- [ ] Documentation update (README, GLOSSARY, RESOURCES, etc.)
- [ ] Repository maintenance (tooling, templates, etc.)

## Clinical content changes

**If you changed any clinical content** (drug information, risk scores, standard references,
clinical procedures), you MUST complete this section. PRs with unverified clinical content
will not be merged.

### What changed clinically?

### Authoritative source(s) for this change

> Cite the specific source — URL, document name, section, and date accessed.
> Examples: "BNF 87 (March 2024), Paracetamol, Prescribing information"
> or "NICE NG153 COVID-19 rapid guideline: managing COVID-19 (updated Feb 2024)"

### Have you removed NHS England branding from any adapted content?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No NHS England branding was present
- [ ] Not applicable (no NHS content adapted)

### Does your change reproduce any DCB Information Standard text verbatim?

DCB0129 and DCB0160 text cannot be adapted without NHS England consent.
References and educational summaries are fine; verbatim reproduction is not.

- [ ] No verbatim DCB text included
- [ ] Not applicable

## OGL Attribution

If your change references or adapts NHS England content, confirm:

- [ ] The OGL attribution footer is present in any modified skill files
- [ ] No NHS England logos or visual branding added
- [ ] No implied NHS England endorsement

## Testing

- [ ] I have installed the skill locally and tested it in Claude Code
- [ ] The skill produces clinically appropriate output for its intended purpose
- [ ] I have read the relevant section of [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
